title: cynoglossum divaricatum
intro: Cynoglossum divaricatum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or silvercard, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Cynoglossum divaricatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
